news.summary: The company is also requesting shareholder approval for an updated omnibus plan. The plan includes amendments and restatements to better align with the company's current goals and objectives. Shareholders will be voting on this proposal during an upcoming meeting. This amended plan aims to enhance corporate governance and increase transparency. Shareholders are encouraged to review the details of the proposed amendments before the vote. The company believes that these changes are necessary for future growth and sustainability. Shareholders play a crucial role in shaping the company's direction, with a significant impact on its overall performance. The approval of this amended omnibus plan is vital for the company's continued success.
news.headline: NurExone advances ExoPTEN towards clinical trials with validated new manufacturing process, seeks shareholder approval for omnibus plan.

This move underscores the company’s commitment to advancing innovative therapeutic solutions in this space.
news.headline: Cullinan Therapeutics obtains rights to Velinotamig from Genrix Bio for autoimmune diseases, bolstering their TCE pipeline.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Voxtur Analytics Corp. (TSXV: VXTR; OTCQB: VXTRF), a tech company in North America enhancing the real estate lending ecosystem’s transparency, released a letter from CEO Ryan Marshall.
news.headline: Voxtur Analytics Corp. (VXTR) releases update from CEO Ryan Marshall about creating transparent real estate lending ecosystem.

news.summary: A recent report indicated that the global CO2 emissions reached a record high of 41.5 billion tons in 2021, showcasing a concerning increase compared to the previous year. The rise in emissions was primarily driven by the energy sector, which contributed approximately 72% of the total emissions. The transportation sector followed closely behind, accounting for 16% of the global CO2 output. These findings highlight the urgent need for stronger climate actions and commitments to address the growing environmental challenges. Efforts to reduce emissions and transition to sustainable energy sources are crucial in mitigating the impacts of climate change and protecting the planet for future generations.
news.headline: Five Below, Inc. reveals Q1 fiscal 2025 financial performance.

news.summary: Rafael Holdings, Inc. announced the closing of its $25 million rights offering, with 3,130,480 shares of Class B common stock subscribed at $1.28 per share, totaling $4,007,014.40 in gross proceeds. Howard Jonas, the CEO, and his affiliates who own 32% of the company's stock did not exercise their subscription rights due to a commitment to backstop the offering. They are purchasing the unsubscribed shares for $20,992,985.60. The offering expired on May 29, 2025, and the company successfully raised funds both through subscriptions and the backstop private placement.
news.headline: Rafael Holdings, Inc. closed $25.0M rights offering with 3,130,480 shares subscribed, generating $4,007,014.40. CEO backed $20,992,985.60 for unsubscribed shares.

news.summary: On June 04, 2025, RadNet, Inc. (NASDAQ: RDNT) disclosed the finalization of its acquisition of See-Mode Technologies PTE LTD ("See-Mode"), an AI for ultrasound imaging pioneer. See-Mode’s AI applications focus on identifying and characterizing thyroid nodules and breast lesions in ultrasound images, which boosts diagnostic precision and streamlines clinical processes through the creation of uniform reports. These existing applications and forthcoming ones stemming from See-Mode’s technology will bolster DeepHealth's position in population health solutions.
news.headline: RadNet, Inc. buys See-Mode Technologies for AI-driven ultrasound diagnostics improvements, enhancing accuracy & workflows.

news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, on June 4, 2025, Shuttle Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SHPH) revealed the appointment of George Scorsis as Chairman of the Board of Directors. Shuttle Pharma is a specialty pharmaceutical company dedicated to enhancing outcomes for cancer patients undergoing radiation therapy. George Scorsis, who has been a director at the company since February 2025, will now take on the role of Chairman.
news.headline: Shuttle Pharma appoints George Scorsis as Chairman of the Board of Directors; Scorsis has been a director since Feb 2025.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Currency Exchange International, Corp. made an announcement that they will be releasing their financial results for the Second Quarter of 2025, which ended on April 30, 2025. The report will be disclosed after the market closes on Wednesday, June 11, 2025. The Company, listed as (TSX: CXI; OTCQX: CURN), is scheduled to conduct an earnings conference call featuring management on Thursday, June 12, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. EST. During this call, they will delve into the recent financial and operational outcomes.
news.headline: Currency Exchange International will report Q2 2025 results on June 11, 2025, with an earnings call on June 12 at 8:30 AM EST.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.5%, indicating a positive trend in the job market. The economy has added 250,000 new jobs, exceeding expectations and showcasing robust growth. Additionally, the stock market has surged, with the S&P 500 reaching a record high of 4,200 points. These indicators suggest a strong economic recovery following the challenges posed by the pandemic. Analysts are optimistic about the future outlook, predicting continued growth and stability in the coming months.
news.headline: Ex-Trump NASA pick hints Musk links led to his removal, Bloomberg reports.

This offer is being made as part of a strategic financial move by CMS Energy.

news.summary: Tech investor Cathie Wood has expressed strong confidence in Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMD) as a key player in the AI chip market. Through her company ARK Invest, Wood has been consistently acquiring AMD stock in 2024 and 2025. In a recent development, ARK Invest bought 53,100 shares of AMD on Tuesday, amounting to approximately $6.08 million. This move signifies Wood's continued bullish stance on AMD's future prospects in the growing AI chip sector. Further insights on disruptive tech investments and influential investors like Elon Musk can be found online.
news.headline: Cathie Wood's ARK Invest buys 53,100 AMD shares worth $6.08 million, betting big on chip stocks like AMD in AI market.

news.summary: In New York, KBRA has provided preliminary ratings for six classes of notes from Tricolor Auto Securitization Trust 2025-2 (“TAST 2025-2”), an ABS transaction involving subprime auto loans. The total issuance of notes amounts to $217.180 million. Credit enhancement for this transaction includes overcollateralization, subordination of junior note classes (excluding Class F notes), a cash reserve account, and excess spread. Initial credit enhancement levels range from 51.70%.
news.headline: KBRA rates Tricolor Auto Securitization Trust 2025-2 with $217.180 million notes, 51.70% initial credit enhancement.

news.summary: In Savannah, Georgia on June 3, 2025, Catalis Dental Lab Partners unveiled key developments in its growth strategy. The company successfully completed the acquisition of Revolution Dental Lab located in Sandy, Utah. Additionally, Catalis has inaugurated a cutting-edge East Coast Digital Design Center in Jacksonville, Florida. These milestones mark a significant advancement in the company's nationwide expansion efforts.
news.headline: Catalis Dental Lab Partners acquires Revolution Dental Lab in Sandy, Utah and opens East Coast Digital Design Center in Jacksonville, Florida.

news.summary: BMI Imaging Systems, Inc. based in Sunnyvale, California, proudly becomes certified as a Veteran-Owned Small Business on June 4, 2025. This certification showcases their dedication to service and quality, joining the prestigious ranks of businesses owned by veterans. BMI Imaging Systems, Inc. has met all requirements to be officially recognized by the U.S. Small Business Administration, highlighting their commitment to excellence.
news.headline: BMI Imaging Systems becomes SBA-certified as a Veteran-Owned Small Business in Sunnyvale, CA on June 4, 2025.

news.summary: In June 2024, Harju County Court ended criminal proceedings against former Tallinna Sadam board member Ain Kaljurand, Allan Kiil, and other defendants due to the statute of limitations. The defendants were accused of participating in corrupt agreements, deemed as private sector corruption with a shorter limitation period. The decision led to the release of seized properties and partial coverage of procedure expenses. The court ruling prevented examination of a civil claim by Tallinna Sadam and TS Laevad OÜ. Both companies appealed to Tallinn Circuit Court, arguing the defendants should be seen as officials, warranting a resolution on the civil claim.
news.headline: Former Tallinn Sadam board members' criminal case dropped due to statute of limitations for private sector corruption. Civil claim not examined. Victims appeal.

news.summary: Today, in Orlando, Florida on June 04, 2025, Abacus Global Management, Inc. (NASDAQ: ABL), a prominent player in alternative asset management, issued a statement in response to a deceptive short attack.
news.headline: Abacus Global Management refutes false short report, claims consistent revenues in line with 20-year track record.

news.summary: Today in Grand Baie, Mauritius, Alphamin Resources Corp disclosed that its shareholder, Tremont Master Holdings (TMH), has finalized a deal to sell 718,990,967 common shares of the company to International Resource Holding (IRH) in Abu Dhabi. The sale represents about 56% of the total common shares at a price of C$0.70 per share, totaling C$503,293,677 (US$367,001,749), with potential adjustments. This was announced in a news release by TMH and IRH on June 3, 2025. Alphamin Resources Corp trades on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol AFM and the JSE AltX under the symbol APH.
news.headline: Alphamin majority shareholder sells 56% stake to IRH for C$503,293,677, reducing outstanding common shares.

news.summary: Today, the Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all experienced gains in the stock market as investors analyzed a jobs report. The indexes demonstrated mixed performance amidst indications of economic deceleration. Key stocks are currently being tested at critical levels as per live coverage.
news.headline: Stock market indexes mixed after report on economic slowing; Dow, S&P 500 up. Nasdaq rises. Blog coverage by Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: More and more investors are looking for a way to tap into the crypto market without the unpredictability of owning cryptocurrencies directly. Global X Management Company LLC has responded to this demand by launching a new ETF called the Global X Bitcoin Covered Call ETF (NASDAQ: BCCC). This innovative ETF blends exposure to Bitcoin with a carefully managed covered call strategy. The main goal is to generate income on a weekly basis by selling call options while also mitigating some of the ups and downs associated with digital assets. The ETF aims to provide a more stable investment opportunity in the crypto space. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Global X launched a Bitcoin Covered Call ETF (BCCC) to provide structured crypto exposure with reduced volatility.

news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia, Searchlight Cyber assisted in the recent dismantling of the dark web marketplace BidenCash, as revealed by the U.S. Department of Justice. This operation led to the confiscation of 145 domains connected to the marketplace, both on the dark web and regular internet, along with cryptocurrency funds. The BidenCash domains have been shut down and will now reroute to a server controlled by U.S. law enforcement, thwarting any potential future activities.
news.headline: Searchlight Cyber assists U.S. gov in dismantling BidenCash Dark Web Marketplace, seizing 145 domains and cryptocurrency funds.

news.summary: In Redwood City, California, Rocketgraph, a company specializing in high-performance, no-code graph analytics platforms, has named Walt Maguire as its new Vice President of Product. Known for his customer-centric approach and expertise in data technology, Maguire brings decades of experience in driving customer success and introducing innovative product solutions. His appointment aims to spearhead the development of the Rocketgraph platform, empowering customers to fully leverage the potential of graph analytics.
news.headline: Rocketgraph names Walt Maguire as VP of Product. Maguire brings decades of experience to evolve the platform for success.
